targets.rationale: V11 minimum is a recovery target from v10 regression, not a same-cycle promotion target. Stretch aims to regain the pre-v10 envelope while keeping bridge transfer validation mandatory.

intent_correct_field_mismatch.interpretation: primary intent often survives, while constraints, risk, operations, and information_state values drift

intent_mismatch.interpretation: clarify boundary collapse plus respond/build and explain/verify spillover must be handled separately from field exactness

constraint_omission_fast_path.interpretation: constraint values are omitted rather than confused, so trace/merge propagation should be inspected before adding more samples
constraint_omission_fast_path.first_action: inspect constraint propagation and marker merge logic before expanding fixtures

risk_confusion_learning_path.interpretation: risk values move in both directions, so boundary data and ladder calibration are likely needed
risk_confusion_learning_path.first_action: separate no-risk contrast from medium/high escalation examples

evidence_patterns: negated dependency framing should not become dependency-risk assessment
medical-term UI/design discussion should not become diagnosis/clinical advice
license-name definition should not become high legal/current advice
local column/folder/current wording should not become web-current search pressure
hook_keyword_overfire_without_context.interpretation: guard hooks may fire on keyword presence before negation, metalinguistic role, or local-reference checks
hook_keyword_overfire_without_context.first_action: audit hook firing logic for negation scope, metacontext markers, definition intent, and local-current split

definition_request_build_overroute.pattern: one-sentence definition or meaning requests can be over-routed to build
definition_request_build_overroute.interpretation: respond/build boundary needs a narrow definition-request guard before broader build routing
definition_request_build_overroute.first_action: add definition-request contrast to intent boundary plan

literal_profile_patch_overfit.interpretation: v6-v9 repair profiles were largely per-fixture literal regex patches, so isolated nonsealed exactness did not transfer to sealed v10 wording
literal_profile_patch_overfit.first_action: convert repair examples into abstract marker/context rules and require naturalized paraphrase transfer checks

source_focus.finding: field-level errors hide whether failures are value vocabulary drift or routing logic defects
source_focus.v11_action: make value_diff mandatory in post-sealed taxonomy reports

focus_areas.v11_rule: all post-measurement and replay reports must retain expected/predicted value diffs, not just field names

source_focus.finding: clarify recall collapsed and clarify cases dispersed across respond, verify, and explore
source_focus.v11_action: create independent clarify boundary diagnostic and nonsealed repair lane before fresh rotation

focus_areas.v11_rule: clarify repair must be its own lane with recall target and transition analysis

source_focus.finding: multiple_intents is the largest critical-signal miss after v10
source_focus.v11_action: treat multiple intent detection as its own target, not a generic information_state item

focus_areas.v11_rule: multiple_intents gets an independent recall target and cannot be hidden inside generic information_state exactness

source_focus.finding: isolated bridge replay was exact, but sealed v10 regressed on all five metrics
source_focus.v11_action: block another bridge-only cycle until template/style distribution gap is explicitly tested

focus_areas.v11_rule: bridge-derived samples must pass naturalized paraphrase and mixed-language transfer checks before mainline adoption

source_focus.finding: cases with correct primary intent still miss constraints/risk/operations and need a separate exactness lane
source_focus.v11_action: separate field-exactness repair from intent-boundary repair

focus_areas.v11_rule: field exactness repair is separate from intent-boundary repair and can use different fixtures/gates

definition_request_build_overroute.first_action: add narrow definition-request contrast before broader build expansion

constraint_omission_fast_path.first_action: inspect constraint propagation and merge logic before adding more fixture cases

risk_confusion_learning_path.first_action: calibrate risk ladder with no-risk contrast and escalation pairs

source_evidence.hypothesis: keyword-only guard firing before negation/metacontext/local-reference checks

hook_overfire_repair_lane.first_action: audit hook firing logic before generating more repair fixtures

literal_profile_patch_overfit.summary: v6-v9 profile layers are dominated by specific literal-regex repair patches rather than general routing logic

evidence.v9_primary_review_docstring: User-approved V9 primary-review 34-row non-sealed repair signals.
evidence.v9_extension_docstring: User-approved V9 extension focused on constraint/operation exactness.

_v7_generalization_profile.docstring: Non-sealed V7 repair signals generalized from draft replay taxonomy.
example_regex_literals: (?:対象|対象DB|DB|対象サービス|サービス|対象ユーザー層|ログ|状況説明)[^。]*?(?:未定|未指定|分かりません|ありません)

_v8_recovery_profile.docstring: Non-sealed V8 recovery signals from priority-review replay gaps.
example_regex_literals: \b(?:text|paragraph|log|source data|options?|option a|option b)\b[^.?!]*(?:missing|not provided|not described|not attached|not pasted)

_v9_primary_review_profile.docstring: User-approved V9 primary-review 34-row non-sealed repair signals.

_v9_constraint_operation_extension_profi.docstring: User-approved V9 extension focused on constraint/operation exactness.
example_regex_literals: \bBriefly list three deployment risks as bullet points, no table\b
\bReturn only JSON with keys action and reason\b
\bBefore editing the README, ask which section I want changed\b
\bdo not store this personal note as memory\b
\bVerify this vendor claim with sources and avoid overclaiming\b
\bDesign a medical AI screen layout without diagnosis or treatment advice\b
\bfriendly but precise tone and avoid overstating the evidence\b

decompilation.known_failure_reason: dictionary/set comprehension opcodes were not handled by the external decompiler scan
decompilation.policy: do not treat partial decompile as authoritative source; use source recovery plus regression oracle

v11_implications.step2_curriculum_rule: repair samples must be converted into abstract marker/context rules plus paraphrase transfer checks, not copied as per-fixture literal regexes

baseline_pyc_loader.risk: router import depends on ignored __pycache__ bytecode and unreadable v7-v9 logic
baseline_pyc_loader.required_action: keep source-recovered baseline under regression tests; do not restore pyc loader

literal_profile_patch_overfit.risk: v6-v9 profile layers used fixture-specific literal regex patches; this explains bridge/profile non-transfer when sealed wording changes
literal_profile_patch_overfit.required_action: fold literal-profile overfit into Step 2 curriculum; replace per-sentence regex patches with abstract rules plus paraphrase transfer gates

evidence.summary: v6-v9 profile layers are dominated by specific literal-regex repair patches rather than general routing logic

hook_keyword_overfire_without_context.risk: retrieval hooks use substring matching without negation, metacontext, definition-intent, or local-current checks
hook_keyword_overfire_without_context.required_action: add hook context guard and nonsealed false-positive fixture before relying on hook-derived risk/current signals

constraint_omission_fast_path.risk: constraint omissions cannot be fully classified until marker firing and constraint merge paths are traced in source
constraint_omission_fast_path.required_action: after source recovery, compare marker firing versus constraint merge/clearing for omission cases

fixture_coverage_gap.required_action: schema-bridge PLM-adjacent fixtures or extend block scanner loaders

recommended_actions.action: recover readable semantic_routing/baseline.py source from pyc/archive/temp patches or explicitly replace the runtime with auditable source
recommended_actions.done_when: baseline.py no longer imports behavior through marshal/exec from __pycache__ and full pytest passes

recommended_actions.action: ban one-regex-per-failed-fixture repairs and require paraphrase/transfer validation for profile-derived fixes
recommended_actions.done_when: V11 curriculum records literal-profile overfit and gates new repairs with naturalized paraphrase holdouts

recommended_actions.action: add negation/metacontext/definition/local-current guard around knowledge-index hook matching
recommended_actions.done_when: nonsealed hook-overfire false-positive fixture passes with zero overfire

recommended_actions.action: trace constraint marker firing and merge/clearing after baseline source recovery
recommended_actions.done_when: constraint omission is classified as marker coverage gap, merge bug, or suppression bug

recommended_actions.action: extend sample block scan to PLM-adjacent v5/v6/v7 fixture schema families
recommended_actions.done_when: block scan covers at least the additional 132 router-relevant cases
